creator: _jkrow
caption:
The destination was never the point…fueling up with iced coffee at @aromajoescoffee before a road trip with my best friend was ☕️🥹 

We grabbed our drinks through the Aroma Joes app before hitting the road, and now you can send your bestie a little surprise too 🤍 

Download the Aroma Joe’s app + send a $10 gift card through AJ’s Rewards during June to be entered to win matching sweatshirts and a $100 Aroma Joe’s gift card for you and your bestie ✨ 

#BestieFuelRun #sponsored

transcription.text: Best part of the road trip. Oh, I didn't think I was doing coffee. I'm Robert Jones!
